creator: gavin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-amd64->freebsd-multimedia

Over to maintainer(s). 

To dubmitter: do you mean that the line-in is passed to the line-out 
without amplification?  Have you tried adjusting the igain? 

Could you also please provide the output of: 
sysctl dev.hdac.0.pindump=1 ; grep hda /var/log/messages
